about.metaDescription: VibeUniv is an educational platform helping vibe coders understand and learn the tech stacks of projects they've built with AI.
about.ogDescription: AI learning platform for vibe coders
about.title: About VibeUniv
about.subtitle: You've built it — that's half the journey. Complete the other half here.
about.missionP1: VibeUniv is an educational platform helping vibe coders understand and learn the tech stacks of projects they've built with AI. While anyone can now build apps with
about.missionP1Suffix: like Claude Code, Cursor, and Bolt, understanding and maintaining that code remains challenging.
about.missionP2Prefix: We bridge this gap. AI analyzes your actual project and creates a personalized
about.missionP2Suffix: using your code as the textbook. Not abstract lectures, but learning by looking at the real code you built.
about.how1Desc: Connect your project via MCP or file upload. Supports 7 AI tools including Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf.
about.how2Desc: AI automatically analyzes your project's tech stack, identifying how technologies like Next.js, React, and Supabase are used.
about.how3Desc: Generates a personalized learning roadmap using your code as the textbook, including explanations, code walkthroughs, quizzes, and challenges.
about.how4Desc: Select any code and the AI tutor explains it in your project's context, providing answers specific to your code rather than generic responses.
about.feat1Desc: When connected via MCP, analysis and content generation are performed by your local AI. 99.5% server LLM cost reduction with code privacy guaranteed.
about.feat2Desc: Supports 11 providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Groq, Mistral, and DeepSeek. Use your own API key with BYOK.
about.feat3Desc: API keys encrypted with AES-256-GCM, Row Level Security on all tables, protected with CSP headers and rate limiting.
about.ctaDesc: Connect your AI-built project and start your journey to understanding your code.

contact.metaDescription: Contact VibeUniv. We're here to help with service usage, billing, technical support, and more.
contact.ogDescription: Service usage, billing, and technical support inquiries
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Feel free to reach out. We'll respond quickly.
contact.emailDesc: Service usage, billing, technical support, and more
contact.responseDesc: Response within 24 hours on business days
contact.faq1A: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page to receive a reset link via your registered email.
contact.faq2Q: I want to cancel my subscription
contact.faq2A: Go to Settings > Subscription & Billing and access the Stripe Customer Portal to manage your subscription. You can continue using the service until the end of your billing period.
contact.faq3A: Make sure your API key is correctly configured. Check the Guide page for step-by-step setup instructions. If it still doesn't work, contact support@vibeuniv.com.
contact.faq4A: Files may be too large or in an unsupported format. We recommend max 50 files, under 100KB each. For persistent errors, please contact us via email.
contact.faq5Q: How do I get a refund?
contact.faq5A: Full refund available within 7 days of payment. Send a refund request to support@vibeuniv.com and it will be processed within 3 business days.
contact.linkFeatureGuideSuffix: — Learn how to use each menu in detail.

blog.metaDescription: Insights and guides about vibe coding, AI learning, and tech stack analysis. Stay updated with the VibeUniv blog.
blog.ogDescription: Insights and guides about vibe coding and AI learning
blog.subtitle: Insights and guides about vibe coding, AI learning, and tech stacks
blog.ctaDesc: Connect your AI-built project and start personalized learning with your code as the textbook.

learnDetail.ctaTitle: Want to study the remaining modules?
learnDetail.ctaDesc: Sign up for free to access the full curriculum with AI tutor, quizzes, and code challenges.
learnDetail.membersOnly: This module is members-only content. Sign up for free to access the full curriculum.
learnDetail.previewEnd: That's the end of the preview!
learnDetail.previewEndDesc: Start the remaining modules with AI tutor, quizzes, and code challenges for free.

technology.metaDescription: VibeUniv's ontology-based learning system. Systematically understand AI-generated code with knowledge graphs, concept mastery tracking, and adaptive curricula.
technology.title: The Science of Understanding AI-Generated Code
technology.subtitle: VibeUniv is not just an educational platform. By combining an ontology-based knowledge system with an adaptive learning engine, we deliver an optimized learning experience for each user.

kg.title: Knowledge Graph System
kg.intro: Even with thousands of books in a library, you can't find what you need without a classification system. VibeUniv's knowledge graph is the classification system for the programming world.
kg.classDesc: Core concepts for each technology like Next.js, React, and TypeScript are systematically classified.
kg.prereqDesc: Automatically identifies prerequisite relationships like "You need to know Components before learning React Hooks."
kg.masteryDesc: Tracks how well you understand each concept individually and automatically identifies areas that need improvement.
kg.tip: 💡 Thanks to the knowledge graph, contextual learning recommendations like "You've mastered App Router, so you're ready to learn Server Actions" become possible.

ac.title: Adaptive Curriculum Engine
ac.intro: Even with the same technology, every project's code is different. VibeUniv analyzes your actual code and generates learning content tailored to it.
ac.step1Desc: Analyzes source code to automatically identify technologies, patterns, and architecture used.
ac.step2Desc: Automatically determines beginner/intermediate/advanced level based on project complexity and technology usage. Beginners get more analogies and visual explanations.
ac.step3Desc: Explains by referencing the code you actually built, not abstract examples. Like "In your layout.tsx, this part..."
ac.step4Desc: Reinforces understanding through various formats: concept explanations, code walkthroughs, multiple-choice quizzes, code challenges, and reviews.

lf.title: Local-First AI Architecture
lf.introSuffix: , AI analysis and content generation are performed directly in your local environment. Your code is never sent to external servers.
lf.privacyDesc: Analysis is performed by your local AI, and only the results (tech stack list) are stored on the server. Your source code is never transmitted to the server.
lf.costDesc: By minimizing server-side AI calls, we've drastically reduced operational costs. These savings translate to affordable pricing for you.

ml.title: Multi LLM Support
ml.intro: No vendor lock-in to a single AI model. With 11 LLM providers supported, you can choose the best model for each task.
ml.byokSuffix: : On the Pro plan, register your own API key to freely use any model you prefer. Keys are securely stored with AES-256-GCM encryption.

qa.title: Content Quality Assurance
qa.intro: AI-generated learning content goes through automatic quality validation. If it falls below standards, it's automatically regenerated, ensuring a consistently high-quality learning experience.
qa.diffDesc: Beginners get more detailed explanations, more code examples, and more diverse quizzes. Advanced learners get concise, focused content.
qa.autoDesc: If generated content doesn't pass quality standards, it's automatically regenerated. Users always see validated content.
qa.multiDesc: Native-quality learning content in both Korean and English. Not translations, but content optimized for each language.

comp.title: How We Differ from Traditional Learning
comp.vibeuniv1: ✅ Learn with your actual code as textbook
comp.vibeuniv3: ✅ Systematic learning based on knowledge graph
comp.vibeuniv4: ✅ AI tutor answers in your code's context

technology.ctaDesc: Connect your AI-built project and start ontology-based personalized learning.

learn.metaDescription: Preview AI-analyzed project-based learning curricula for free. Understand the tech stacks of apps built with vibe coding. A new way to learn where your code becomes the textbook.
learn.ogTitle: AI-Personalized Learning Curriculum — Learn Tech Stacks with Your Code
learn.ogDescription: Check out personalized learning content created by AI analyzing real projects. Step-by-step roadmaps from beginner to advanced.
learn.heroTitle: A New Way to Learn Where Your Code Becomes the Textbook
learn.heroP1: Built an app with AI tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Bolt, but struggling to understand how the code works? VibeUniv's AI analyzes your actual project and automatically creates a custom curriculum tailored to the tech stacks used.
learn.heroP2: Instead of abstract online courses, your own code is the textbook. Learn the technologies actually used in your project — Next.js, React, Supabase, Tailwind CSS — one by one. From complete beginners to experienced developers, AI designs a step-by-step roadmap matched to your level.
learn.heroP3Prefix: Browse public learning curricula below, or
learn.heroP3Suffix: to create your own personalized curriculum.
learn.howSubtitle: Connect your project and personalized learning begins in 3 steps.
learn.how1Desc: Connect your project via MCP server or file upload, and AI automatically analyzes the tech stack. See at a glance which frameworks, libraries, and patterns are used.
learn.how2Desc: Based on the analysis, AI creates a personalized learning roadmap. Choose your difficulty from beginner to advanced, and a structured curriculum with modules is automatically generated.
learn.how3Desc: Each module includes concept explanations, code walkthroughs, and quizzes. Select any code during learning and the AI tutor explains it in your project's context.
learn.featuresSubtitle: Different from typical online courses. Learning centered on your code, your project.
learn.feat1Desc: Instead of abstract examples, learn with code from the project you actually built. Understand why your app/layout.tsx looks the way it does, why useEffect is needed in this component — all in the context of your code.
learn.feat2Desc: Drag to select any code and AI explains it immediately. Not generic ChatGPT answers, but contextual responses that understand your project's file structure and tech stack.
learn.feat3Title: Quizzes & Challenges to Test Your Skills
learn.feat3Desc: Each module includes quizzes and code challenges to verify what you've learned. Scores are automatically tracked with best scores recorded. Stay motivated with badges and streaks.
learn.feat4Desc: Supports 11 AI models including Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, Google Gemini, Groq, Mistral, and DeepSeek. On the Pro plan, register your own API key (BYOK) to learn with your preferred model.
learn.target1: You built an app with AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Bolt) and want to understand the code
learn.target2: You want to learn frameworks like React and Next.js through real projects
learn.target3: Online courses haven't helped you apply what you learned in practice
learn.target4: You want to truly understand your project's architecture and patterns
learn.target5: You want to improve your skills through self-study without a coding bootcamp
learn.target6: Any developer looking to level up from vibe coding
learn.res1Desc: Introducing effective learning strategies for understanding projects built with vibe coding.
learn.res2Desc: Explore the technical foundations of the learning system, including ontology-based knowledge graphs and concept mastery tracking.
learn.res3Desc: Step-by-step guide to all VibeUniv features, from connecting projects to completing learning.
learn.publicSubtitle: Preview learning curricula built from other vibe coders' projects for free. Read the first 2 modules right away.
learn.ctaDesc: Connect your project and AI will analyze the tech stack and create a learning roadmap using your code as the textbook. Analyze up to 3 projects on the free plan.

features.metaDescription: Explore VibeUniv's features in detail. A complete guide to Dashboard, Projects, Learning, Settings, and Rewards.
features.title: Feature Guide by Menu
features.subtitle: A detailed guide to what you can do in each menu of VibeUniv.
features.ctaDesc: Experience all core features on the free plan. Get started in just 5 minutes.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: The first screen you see after logging in. Get an overview of your projects and learning progress at a glance.
dashboard.tip: Click the "Daily Nudge" banner on the dashboard to go directly to the learning page. Even 5 minutes of daily learning builds your streak and helps form a learning habit.
dashboard.projectOverviewDesc: Shows registered projects, analyzed tech stacks, and recent activity in card format. You can also see each project's analysis status (pending/in progress/complete) at a glance.
dashboard.learningProgressDesc: Check your current curriculum completion rate and the next module to study. A progress bar shows completed modules vs. total modules.
dashboard.streakDesc: Tracks consecutive learning days. View this week's learning status on the weekly calendar, and see your longest streak record.
dashboard.nudgeDesc: Motivational banners like "Study today for a 3-day streak!" appear. On days you haven't studied, it encourages you to get back on track.
dashboard.badgesDesc: Recently earned badges and achievements are displayed on the dashboard. You can also see locked badges to set your next goals.

projects.title: Projects
projects.desc: Register your AI-built projects and let AI automatically analyze the tech stack.
projects.tip: With MCP integration, there's no need to manually upload project files — one command from your AI coding tool auto-registers everything. Supports Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Gemini CLI, Kimi Code, and OpenAI Codex.
projects.registerDesc: Auto-register via MCP integration or upload files directly from the web. Supports 7 AI tools including Claude Code and Cursor.
projects.analysisDesc: AI analyzes your project's package.json, config files, and source code to identify technologies used and their roles. Choose from 11 AI models.
projects.resultsDesc: View the analyzed tech stack list, each technology's category (framework/DB/auth/etc.), and version information in clean cards.
projects.sourceCodeDesc: Up to 50 files are sent during analysis. Curriculum generation and AI tutor reference your actual code to provide personalized learning.
projects.securityDesc: Sensitive files like .env, certificates, and key files are automatically excluded. Unnecessary folders like node_modules and .git are not transmitted.
projects.manageDesc: Register and manage multiple projects. Free plan allows 3, Pro is unlimited.

learning.title: Learning
learning.desc: Learn with AI-generated custom curricula using your project's actual code as the textbook.
learning.tip: Choosing beginner difficulty explains concepts first with analogies and everyday examples, and translates code line by line. Designed to be understandable even without programming experience.
learning.curriculumDesc: One click of "Generate Curriculum" and AI creates a 10-15 module learning roadmap for your project. Choose difficulty (beginner/intermediate/advanced).
learning.contentTypesDesc: Each module consists of concept explanations, code examples (including before/after comparisons), quizzes, code challenges, and reviews. Theory and practice together.
learning.quizDesc: Take quizzes in each module and scores are recorded. Best scores are automatically maintained, and you can retake to challenge for higher scores.
learning.prereqDesc: Prerequisites between modules are automatically calculated. Complete earlier modules to unlock the next ones, enabling systematic learning.
learning.tutorDesc: Select any code during learning and the AI tutor explains it in your project's context. Use both the chat tab and Google search tab.
learning.knowledgeGraphDesc: Visually see how the concepts you've learned connect. Tracks concept-level mastery based on ontology and recommends what to learn next.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage personal settings including profile, API keys, LLM keys, language, and subscription.
settings.tip: Register your own LLM API key with BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) to use all AI features unlimitedly on the Pro plan. Keys are securely stored with AES-256-GCM encryption.
settings.apiKeyDesc: Issue and manage VibeUniv API keys needed for MCP integration. Keys are shown only once, so store them safely. Create multiple keys for different projects.
settings.llmKeyDesc: Register your own LLM API keys on the Pro plan. Supports 11 providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Groq, Mistral, and DeepSeek.
settings.encryptionDesc: All API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Keys are never stored in plaintext or transmitted externally. You can delete keys at any time.
settings.languageDesc: Choose between Korean and English. Learning content, AI tutor responses, and UI are all provided in your selected language.
settings.billingDesc: Check your current plan, upgrade to Pro/Team, and view payment history. Payments are securely processed through Stripe, and subscription management is available directly in the Stripe Portal.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.desc: Earn points, collect badges, and redeem rewards as you learn.
rewards.tip: Completing a module triggers a celebration confetti animation! Earn points through module completion (100P), perfect quiz scores (50P), consecutive learning bonuses, and more.
rewards.pointsDesc: Earn points through various activities like module completion, quiz answers, and consecutive learning. View daily/weekly activity summaries.
rewards.badgesAchDesc: Earn 10 types of badges including "First Step", "Quiz Master", "Consistent Learner", and "Concept Master". Completing a module also triggers a celebration animation!
rewards.streakChallengeDesc: Set weekly goals (2/3/5/7 days) and challenge yourself to learn consecutively. Earn bonus points when you reach your goal. Track progress on the weekly calendar.
rewards.galleryDesc: View all earned and locked badges. Each badge shows its unlock conditions, making it easy to set your next goals.
rewards.redeemDesc: Exchange earned points for various rewards. The more you learn, the more benefits you unlock.
